meaning: n.(印度中、西部的)马拉地人
examples: Almost a third of its population was non-Maratha then; over half is today.
After the decline of the Mughals, western, central and parts of south and north India were integrated and administered by the Maratha Empire.
In 1818, the last of the Maratha Wars between the British and the Maratha Confederacy in India ended, securing British supremacy in India.
